vulnerabilities.title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
vulnerabilities.description: The security header 'Content-Security-Policy' is missing from the server response.
vulnerabilities.impact: CSP helps prevent XSS and other injection attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Configure the server to include the Content-Security-Policy header in all responses.

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Security Header: Strict-Transport-Security
vulnerabilities.description: The security header 'Strict-Transport-Security' is missing from the server response.
vulnerabilities.impact: HSTS ensures the browser only communicates over HTTPS.
vulnerabilities.fix: Configure the server to include the Strict-Transport-Security header in all responses.

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Security Header: X-Content-Type-Options
vulnerabilities.description: The security header 'X-Content-Type-Options' is missing from the server response.
vulnerabilities.fix: Configure the server to include the X-Content-Type-Options header in all responses.

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Security Header: X-Frame-Options
vulnerabilities.description: The security header 'X-Frame-Options' is missing from the server response.
vulnerabilities.fix: Configure the server to include the X-Frame-Options header in all responses.

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Security Header: Referrer-Policy
vulnerabilities.description: The security header 'Referrer-Policy' is missing from the server response.
vulnerabilities.impact: Controls how much referrer information is sent with requests.
vulnerabilities.fix: Configure the server to include the Referrer-Policy header in all responses.
